title: Cinematic
description: A small mod that aims to bring a fresh perspective to adventure through several specific cinematics that trigger automatically in-game, along with a unique cinematic point of view.
body:
**🎬 Cinematic Events**

Before browsing the gallery, we highly recommend watching our short preview video below — because as the name suggests, this mod is all about cinematic motion and animation, not still images. A single screenshot simply can't do it justice.

Minecraft should feel like an adventure. Now it does.

Cinematic Events is a client-side Forge mod that transforms your Minecraft experience by adding handcrafted cinematic cutscenes to the most iconic moments of the game — and a cinematic camera mode to make every journey feel like a movie.

**👤 Preview**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/HPHboPC4wpo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**✨ Features**
Cinematic Cutscenes
Key moments in your Minecraft journey now come to life with automatic cinematic sequences:

World Load — A cinematic intro plays when you first load into the world (may not trigger if another mod or plugin extends the loading screen)
First Morning — Your very first sunrise gets the cinematic treatment it deserves
First Village — Discovering your first village is now a moment to remember
Every Morning — Each new day begins with a smooth cinematic wake-up sequence
The End Portal — The opening of the End portal and the individual placement of the eyes.
End Dimension Entry — Arriving in The End triggers a breathtaking cinematic
Ender Dragon — The ultimate boss encounter is now a true cinematic event

 **🎥 Cinematic Camera Mode**
A toggleable cinematic camera that puts the world in a whole new perspective:

Smooth, flowing camera movement ideal for exploration and travel
Not designed for combat — if a mob targets you while in cinematic mode, the camera automatically switches back to normal so you're never caught off guard
Perfect for sea voyages, scenic landscapes, and open-world exploration
Full shader support — looks stunning with your favorite shader pack
⚠️ Dense forests may obscure your character's visibility — this is a known limitation outside of our control


**⚙️ Compatibility & Requirements**

Minecraft: 1.20.1
Mod Loader: Forge
Side: Client-side only — no server installation required
Languages: English, Turkish, German, Spanish, French, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese, Russian, Chinese (I should point out that language support isn't very effective, at least not right now, because there isn't much written content.)


**🚧 Alpha Notice**
Cinematic Events is currently in alpha. You may encounter bugs or rough edges. We appreciate your patience and any feedback you share with us.

**🔮 Future Plans**
This mod is just getting started. Potential directions for future development include:

_-Pathfinder-style cinematic camera system
-Combat-compatible camera design
-Expanded cutscene events
-Countless bug fixes and polish_

Have ideas or want to contribute? Reach out to us — we'd love to hear from you.

**📄 License**
This mod is released under the MIT License. You are free to use, modify, and distribute it as long as you provide appropriate credit.

**💛 If Cinematic Events caught your eye, consider following the project!** Your support helps us know the mod is appreciated and motivates future development. Every follow means a lot — thank you!
